TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Ku-lye-al-mow_Ma-ke-ni, title = Ku-lye-al-mow_Ma-ke-ni, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ku-lye-al-mow_Ma-ke-ni} }

S.FORM: Ku-lye-al-mow. Ma-ke-niŚŹ§ŚąóÁąĺŤéę¬∑ť¶¨ŚŹĮŚįľ kakiliman ŚŹ§ŚąóÁąĺŤéę¬∑ŚĖ¨Áď¶Śįľ¬∑ť¶¨ťáĆšļě¬∑ť¶¨ŚŹĮŚįľ(Áĺ©Ś§ßŚą©Ť™ě:Guglielmo Giovanni Maria Marconi,Áĺ©Ś§ßŚą©Ť™ěÁôľťü≥:(…°u é' é…õlmo mar'koňźni),1874ŚĻī4śúą25śó•‚ÄĒ1937ŚĻī7śúą20śó•), . Ku-liye-al-mow. Cyaw-wa-ni. Ma-li-ya.Ma-ke-ni "Itali a kamu, Guglielmo Giovanni Maria Marconi, Itali pangiha a kamu, (…°u é' é…õlmo mar'koňźni), 1874 a mihcaan 4 a bulad 25 a demiad- 1937 a mihcaan 7 a bulan 20 a demiad", I-tali nu sipayaan a sayhu, sinmung mikawaway tu nayay telay satakus a nisanga'ay misumad atu migingkiw misanga', 1909 mihcaan sikawlah tu u-li nuo-peyal. nilaculan . Ma-ke-ni i 1895 a mihca tu sadingsingan miliyung tu tyen-ce-pow mitanam tu sapitakus, nika misaluguc tu cehu nu I-tali a pipadang caay kalaheci. 1896 a mihca i Ing-kow mikawaw tu 14.4 kungliay mitanam tu sapitakus a malaheci, maala ku teked a tungus. 1897 a mihca mikawaw aca tu mahiniay mitanam tu nayay ku telay a sapitakus, i Lun-tun ciniza patizeng tu Ma-ke-ni nayay telay satakus a kusi. 1901 a mihca 12 a bulad 12 a demiad, ci Ma-ke-ni migikiway a sakaput, i Niw-Ben-lan misulup katukuh makay Ing-kow patahkal tu saayaway mibalat milakuit tu sa'tip bayuay nayay tilay dingwa a bangu. 1924 a mihcaan pala tapangen, mala u kakitaan.1932 a miha maazih talakaw ku tatebud nu ngiku. pasubana'ayśēôŤā≤ masakapah henay, ci Ma-ke-ni caay kayadah ku picudad tu kapahay a cacudada, u huw-sye, su-sye, u-li a tineng makayzaay amin i wama wina niza mitakus tu saydan i luma' pasubana'. i labu nu luma' niza miliyas tu Pow-lung-nw a sienaw nu kasienawan, tayza i dihkuay a Tu-s-ka-na atu Bow-low- lun-s hawsa, u wama wina niza mitaakus aca tu saydan a pasubana' i luma'. saayaway pusubana' a saydan ni Ma-ke-ni sa ci Ben-say-co.Lo-sa "Vincenzo Rosa" u Li-ow-no a tuseay nu talakaway a cacudadan u-li-sye a saydan. Ben-say-co.Lo-sa "Vincenzo Rosa" ' psubana' 17 ku mihcaan ni Ma-ke-ni, utineng tu u-li-sye, atu saayaway baluhay a tyen-sye-li-lun. 18 a mihcaan, ci Ma-ke-ni panukas i Pow-lng-na, matineng tu Pow-lng-na talakaway a cacudadan u-li-sye-cya ci Aow-ku-s-to.li-ci "Augusto Righi", uyni u-li-sye-cya sakay ci He-ce-a li-lun mutesek ku pingikiw. ci Li-ci misulul ci Ma-ke-nian micumud tu picudadan a micudad ciniza, namahini kapah micumud tu Pow-Long-na nu talakaway a cacudadan pinanaman migingkiw atu piazihan tu cudad. satakus kawawan henay, ci He-cec-maazih ku tyen-ce-po malilid manamuh ci Ma-ke-ni. zikuz mapasulul ciniza caaykatenes a micaluk tu niAow-ku-s-to.li-ci a gingkiw, Pow-lung-na talakaway a cacudadan cacay u-li-sye pasubana' namapulung aci Ma-ke-ni migingkiw. 1902ŚĻī12śúą17śó•, . 1902 a mihcaan 12 a bulad 17 a demiad Sin-s-ke-se-senay Ke-lay-s-wanay a Ma-ke-ni-can a pasulucan patahkal tu satakus, Cya-na-ta pala i kitakitan saka tusa makay Pey-mye patahkal tu yanay telal a satakus, milakiit tu walibayua kanatal. 1904 a mihcaan, ci Ma-ke-ni patizeng tu cacay misiwbayay kawaw a sakaput, micakay tu saedap patayza tu sandeb nisulitan a sinbun, kuyni nisulitan a sapatakusa micunus sakatukus i balunga' kuyni nisulitan a sapatakus sacunus katukuh I balungaan patahkal tu labuay nu tatipeluk. Ma-ke-ni nayay telay a nisanga'an tu tye-ta-ni-haw nayay telay a satakus i Tye-ta-ni-haw "Titanic" a satebucan u kahenulan a kawaw. yu uyni balungan Ing-kow sakapahay a balunga i 1912 a mihcaan satip bayu masetul ku kuli a buyu' hawsa, misakakawaway nu balunga uyza pakay Ma-ke-ni a nayay telay a dingaw patahkal tu salunguc pauzip a satakus pabeli i Niw-yeay nu mitulesay tu telay. kabalakian a mihcaanśôöŚĻī nu uzip a nikauzip . ci Ma-ke-ni tusa ku kakama ci A-bang-su, atu cacay padek nu wama a sabama , ci Lu-yi-ci. tatusa ku acawa. i Muw-so-li-ni situngus mikuwan tu I-ta-li a zidayan, ci Ma-ke-ni nasakalamkam sa micukel tu nizateng ni Ba-si-s atu mikawaw. pikininganÁīÄŚŅĶ 1968 a mihcaan a sapakining ci Ma-ke-nian sakay nipaayawan nu pahusuay a kawaw, aca mikukay ci Ma-ke-nian tu nayay telay satakus a kusi i 1962 a mihcaan miedap tu Sya-kang palahad tu sapuyu'ay pelat nu pahusuay, Sya-kang cen-hu Ciw-lung-tang a pahusuan zuma cacay a zazan nu Kaw-ya a zazan "Clare Road" pangangan han Ma-ke-ni zazan mala pikiningan. zuma, zumaay a niyazu' Pow-lung-na kitakit a pahikukian pangangan han Ku-liye-al-mow. Ma-ke-ni kitakit a pahikukian mala pikiningan.
S.PHON: ku-r~…ĺj…ô-ar~…ĺ-mow. ma-k…ô-ni******** kakir~…ĺiman ****************(****:gugr~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺmo gio*anni maria mar ¶oni,******:(*u* Ē~ °**r~…ĺmo mar Ē~ °ko*ni),*********************), . ku-r~…ĺij…ô-ar~…ĺ-mow. ¶jaw-wa-ni. ma-r~…ĺi-ja.ma-k…ô-ni "itar~…ĺi a kamu, gugr~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺmo gio*anni maria mar ¶oni, itar~…ĺi paŇčińßa a kamu, (*u* Ē~ °**r~…ĺmo mar Ē~ °ko*ni), **** a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad- **** a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺan ** a d…ômiad", i-tar~…ĺi nu sipajaan a sajńßu, sinmuŇč mikawawaj tu najaj t…ôr~…ĺaj satakus a nisaŇča Ē~ °aj misumad atu migiŇčkiw misaŇča Ē~ °, **** mińß ¶aan sikawr~…ĺańß tu u-r~…ĺi nuo-p…ôar~…ĺ. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan . ma-k…ô-ni i **** a mińß ¶a tu sadiŇčsiŇčan mir~…ĺijuŇč tu tj…ôn- ¶…ô-pow mitanam tu sapitakus, nika misar~…ĺugu ¶ tu ¶…ôńßu nu i-tar~…ĺi a pipadaŇč ¶aaj kar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i. **** a mińß ¶a i iŇč-kow mikawaw tu **.* kuŇčr~…ĺiaj mitanam tu sapitakus a mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i, maar~…ĺa ku t…ôk…ôd a tuŇčus. **** a mińß ¶a mikawaw a ¶a tu mańßiniaj mitanam tu najaj ku t…ôr~…ĺaj a sapitakus, i r~…ĺun-tun ¶iniza patiz…ôŇč tu ma-k…ô-ni najaj t…ôr~…ĺaj satakus a kusi. **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad, ¶i ma-k…ô-ni migikiwaj a sakaput, i niw-b…ôn-r~…ĺan misur~…ĺup katukuńß makaj iŇč-kow patańßkar~…ĺ tu saajawaj mibar~…ĺat mir~…ĺakuit tu sa Ē~ °tip bajuaj najaj tir~…ĺaj diŇčwa a baŇču. **** a mińß ¶aan par~…ĺa tapaŇč…ôn, mar~…ĺa u kakitaan.**** a mińßa maazińß tar~…ĺakaw ku tat…ôbud nu Ňčiku. pasubana Ē~ °aj** masakapańß ńß…ônaj, ¶i ma-k…ô-ni ¶aaj kajadańß ku pi ¶udad tu kapańßaj a ¶a ¶udada, u ńßuw-sj…ô, su-sj…ô, u-r~…ĺi a tin…ôŇč makajzaaj amin i wama wina niza mitakus tu sajdan i r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° pasubana Ē~ °. i r~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° niza mir~…ĺijas tu pow-r~…ĺuŇč-nw a si…ônaw nu kasi…ônawan, tajza i dińßkuaj a tu-s-ka-na atu bow-r~…ĺow- r~…ĺun-s ńßawsa, u wama wina niza mitaakus a ¶a tu sajdan a pasubana Ē~ ° i r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. saajawaj pusubana Ē~ ° a sajdan ni ma-k…ô-ni sa ¶i b…ôn-saj- ¶o.r~…ĺo-sa "*in ¶…ônzo *osa" u r~…ĺi-ow-no a tus…ôaj nu tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan u-r~…ĺi-sj…ô a sajdan. b…ôn-saj- ¶o.r~…ĺo-sa "*in ¶…ônzo *osa" Ē~ ° psubana Ē~ ° ** ku mińß ¶aan ni ma-k…ô-ni, utin…ôŇč tu u-r~…ĺi-sj…ô, atu saajawaj bar~…ĺuńßaj a tj…ôn-sj…ô-r~…ĺi-r~…ĺun. ** a mińß ¶aan, ¶i ma-k…ô-ni panukas i pow-r~…ĺŇč-na, matin…ôŇč tu pow-r~…ĺŇč-na tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan u-r~…ĺi-sj…ô- ¶ja ¶i aow-ku-s-to.r~…ĺi- ¶i "augusto *igńßi", ujni u-r~…ĺi-sj…ô- ¶ja sakaj ¶i ńß…ô- ¶…ô-a r~…ĺi-r~…ĺun mut…ôs…ôk ku piŇčikiw. ¶i r~…ĺi- ¶i misur~…ĺur~…ĺ ¶i ma-k…ô-nian mi ¶umud tu pi ¶udadan a mi ¶udad ¶iniza, namańßini kapańß mi ¶umud tu pow-r~…ĺoŇč-na nu tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan pinanaman migiŇčkiw atu piazińßan tu ¶udad. satakus kawawan ńß…ônaj, ¶i ńß…ô- ¶…ô ¶-maazińß ku tj…ôn- ¶…ô-po mar~…ĺir~…ĺid manamuńß ¶i ma-k…ô-ni. zikuz mapasur~…ĺur~…ĺ ¶iniza ¶aajkat…ôn…ôs a mi ¶ar~…ĺuk tu niaow-ku-s-to.r~…ĺi- ¶i a giŇčkiw, pow-r~…ĺuŇč-na tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan ¶a ¶aj u-r~…ĺi-sj…ô pasubana Ē~ ° namapur~…ĺuŇč a ¶i ma-k…ô-ni migiŇčkiw. ***********, . **** a mińß ¶aan ** a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad sin-s-k…ô-s…ô-s…ônaj k…ô-r~…ĺaj-s-wanaj a ma-k…ô-ni- ¶an a pasur~…ĺu ¶an patańßkar~…ĺ tu satakus, ¶ja-na-ta par~…ĺa i kitakitan saka tusa makaj p…ô-mj…ô patańßkar~…ĺ tu janaj t…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ a satakus, mir~…ĺakiit tu war~…ĺibajua kanatar~…ĺ. **** a mińß ¶aan, ¶i ma-k…ô-ni patiz…ôŇč tu ¶a ¶aj misiwbajaj kawaw a sakaput, mi ¶akaj tu sa…ôdap patajza tu sand…ôb nisur~…ĺitan a sinbun, kujni nisur~…ĺitan a sapatakusa mi ¶unus sakatukus i bar~…ĺuŇča Ē~ ° kujni nisur~…ĺitan a sapatakus sa ¶unus katukuńß i bar~…ĺuŇčaan patańßkar~…ĺ tu r~…ĺabuaj nu tatip…ôr~…ĺuk. ma-k…ô-ni najaj t…ôr~…ĺaj a nisaŇča Ē~ °an tu tj…ô-ta-ni-ńßaw najaj t…ôr~…ĺaj a satakus i tj…ô-ta-ni-ńßaw "titani ¶" a sat…ôbu ¶an u kańß…ônur~…ĺan a kawaw. ju ujni bar~…ĺuŇčan iŇč-kow sakapańßaj a bar~…ĺuŇča i **** a mińß ¶aan satip baju mas…ôtur~…ĺ ku kur~…ĺi a buju Ē~ ° ńßawsa, misakakawawaj nu bar~…ĺuŇča ujza pakaj ma-k…ô-ni a najaj t…ôr~…ĺaj a diŇčaw patańßkar~…ĺ tu sar~…ĺuŇču ¶ pauzip a satakus pab…ôr~…ĺi i niw-j…ôaj nu mitur~…ĺ…ôsaj tu t…ôr~…ĺaj. kabar~…ĺakian a mińß ¶aan** nu uzip a nikauzip . ¶i ma-k…ô-ni tusa ku kakama ¶i a-baŇč-su, atu ¶a ¶aj pad…ôk nu wama a sabama , ¶i r~…ĺu-ji- ¶i. tatusa ku a ¶awa. i muw-so-r~…ĺi-ni situŇčus mikuwan tu i-ta-r~…ĺi a zidajan, ¶i ma-k…ô-ni nasakar~…ĺamkam sa mi ¶uk…ôr~…ĺ tu nizat…ôŇč ni ba-si-s atu mikawaw. pikiniŇčan** **** a mińß ¶aan a sapakiniŇč ¶i ma-k…ô-nian sakaj nipaajawan nu pańßusuaj a kawaw, a ¶a mikukaj ¶i ma-k…ô-nian tu najaj t…ôr~…ĺaj satakus a kusi i **** a mińß ¶aan mi…ôdap tu sja-kaŇč par~…ĺańßad tu sapuju Ē~ °aj p…ôr~…ĺat nu pańßusuaj, sja-kaŇč ¶…ôn-ńßu ¶iw-r~…ĺuŇč-taŇč a pańßusuan zuma ¶a ¶aj a zazan nu kaw-ja a zazan " ¶r~…ĺar…ô *oad" paŇčaŇčan ńßan ma-k…ô-ni zazan mar~…ĺa pikiniŇčan. zuma, zumaaj a nijazu Ē~ ° pow-r~…ĺuŇč-na kitakit a pańßikukian paŇčaŇčan ńßan ku-r~…ĺij…ô-ar~…ĺ-mow. ma-k…ô-ni kitakit a pańßikukian mar~…ĺa pikiniŇčan.
S.FORM: Ku-lye-al-mow. Ma-ke-niŚŹ§ŚąóÁąĺŤéę¬∑ť¶¨ŚŹĮŚįľ kakiliman ŚŹ§ŚąóÁąĺŤéę¬∑ŚĖ¨Áď¶Śįľ¬∑ť¶¨ťáĆšļě¬∑ť¶¨ŚŹĮŚįľ(Áĺ©Ś§ßŚą©Ť™ě:Guglielmo Giovanni Maria Marconi,Áĺ©Ś§ßŚą©Ť™ěÁôľťü≥:(…°u é' é…õlmo mar'koňźni),1874ŚĻī4śúą25śó•‚ÄĒ1937ŚĻī7śúą20śó•), . Ku-liye-al-mow. Cyaw-wa-ni. Ma-li-ya.Ma-ke-ni "Itali a kamu, Guglielmo Giovanni Maria Marconi, Itali pangiha a kamu, (…°u é' é…õlmo mar'koňźni), 1874 a mihcaan 4 a bulad 25 a demiad- 1937 a mihcaan 7 a bulan 20 a demiad", I-tali nu sipayaan a sayhu, sinmung mikawaway tu nayay telay satakus a nisanga'ay misumad atu migingkiw misanga', 1909 mihcaan sikawlah tu u-li nuo-peyal. nilaculan . Ma-ke-ni i 1895 a mihca tu sadingsingan miliyung tu tyen-ce-pow mitanam tu sapitakus, nika misaluguc tu cehu nu I-tali a pipadang caay kalaheci. 1896 a mihca i Ing-kow mikawaw tu 14.4 kungliay mitanam tu sapitakus a malaheci, maala ku teked a tungus. 1897 a mihca mikawaw aca tu mahiniay mitanam tu nayay ku telay a sapitakus, i Lun-tun ciniza patizeng tu Ma-ke-ni nayay telay satakus a kusi. 1901 a mihca 12 a bulad 12 a demiad, ci Ma-ke-ni migikiway a sakaput, i Niw-Ben-lan misulup katukuh makay Ing-kow patahkal tu saayaway mibalat milakuit tu sa'tip bayuay nayay tilay dingwa a bangu. 1924 a mihcaan pala tapangen, mala u kakitaan.1932 a miha maazih talakaw ku tatebud nu ngiku. pasubana'ayśēôŤā≤ masakapah henay, ci Ma-ke-ni caay kayadah ku picudad tu kapahay a cacudada, u huw-sye, su-sye, u-li a tineng makayzaay amin i wama wina niza mitakus tu saydan i luma' pasubana'. i labu nu luma' niza miliyas tu Pow-lung-nw a sienaw nu kasienawan, tayza i dihkuay a Tu-s-ka-na atu Bow-low- lun-s hawsa, u wama wina niza mitaakus aca tu saydan a pasubana' i luma'. saayaway pusubana' a saydan ni Ma-ke-ni sa ci Ben-say-co.Lo-sa "Vincenzo Rosa" u Li-ow-no a tuseay nu talakaway a cacudadan u-li-sye a saydan. Ben-say-co.Lo-sa "Vincenzo Rosa" ' psubana' 17 ku mihcaan ni Ma-ke-ni, utineng tu u-li-sye, atu saayaway baluhay a tyen-sye-li-lun. 18 a mihcaan, ci Ma-ke-ni panukas i Pow-lng-na, matineng tu Pow-lng-na talakaway a cacudadan u-li-sye-cya ci Aow-ku-s-to.li-ci "Augusto Righi", uyni u-li-sye-cya sakay ci He-ce-a li-lun mutesek ku pingikiw. ci Li-ci misulul ci Ma-ke-nian micumud tu picudadan a micudad ciniza, namahini kapah micumud tu Pow-Long-na nu talakaway a cacudadan pinanaman migingkiw atu piazihan tu cudad. satakus kawawan henay, ci He-cec-maazih ku tyen-ce-po malilid manamuh ci Ma-ke-ni. zikuz mapasulul ciniza caaykatenes a micaluk tu niAow-ku-s-to.li-ci a gingkiw, Pow-lung-na talakaway a cacudadan cacay u-li-sye pasubana' namapulung aci Ma-ke-ni migingkiw. 1902ŚĻī12śúą17śó•, . 1902 a mihcaan 12 a bulad 17 a demiad Sin-s-ke-se-senay Ke-lay-s-wanay a Ma-ke-ni-can a pasulucan patahkal tu satakus, Cya-na-ta pala i kitakitan saka tusa makay Pey-mye patahkal tu yanay telal a satakus, milakiit tu walibayua kanatal. 1904 a mihcaan, ci Ma-ke-ni patizeng tu cacay misiwbayay kawaw a sakaput, micakay tu saedap patayza tu sandeb nisulitan a sinbun, kuyni nisulitan a sapatakusa micunus sakatukus i balunga' kuyni nisulitan a sapatakus sacunus katukuh I balungaan patahkal tu labuay nu tatipeluk. Ma-ke-ni nayay telay a nisanga'an tu tye-ta-ni-haw nayay telay a satakus i Tye-ta-ni-haw "Titanic" a satebucan u kahenulan a kawaw. yu uyni balungan Ing-kow sakapahay a balunga i 1912 a mihcaan satip bayu masetul ku kuli a buyu' hawsa, misakakawaway nu balunga uyza pakay Ma-ke-ni a nayay telay a dingaw patahkal tu salunguc pauzip a satakus pabeli i Niw-yeay nu mitulesay tu telay. kabalakian a mihcaanśôöŚĻī nu uzip a nikauzip . ci Ma-ke-ni tusa ku kakama ci A-bang-su, atu cacay padek nu wama a sabama , ci Lu-yi-ci. tatusa ku acawa. i Muw-so-li-ni situngus mikuwan tu I-ta-li a zidayan, ci Ma-ke-ni nasakalamkam sa micukel tu nizateng ni Ba-si-s atu mikawaw. pikininganÁīÄŚŅĶ 1968 a mihcaan a sapakining ci Ma-ke-nian sakay nipaayawan nu pahusuay a kawaw, aca mikukay ci Ma-ke-nian tu nayay telay satakus a kusi i 1962 a mihcaan miedap tu Sya-kang palahad tu sapuyu'ay pelat nu pahusuay, Sya-kang cen-hu Ciw-lung-tang a pahusuan zuma cacay a zazan nu Kaw-ya a zazan "Clare Road" pangangan han Ma-ke-ni zazan mala pikiningan. zuma, zumaay a niyazu' Pow-lung-na kitakit a pahikukian pangangan han Ku-liye-al-mow. Ma-ke-ni kitakit a pahikukian mala pikiningan.

i-tar~…ĺi a pipadaŇč ¶aaj kar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i. **** a mińß ¶a i iŇč-kow mikawaw tu **.* kuŇčr~…ĺiaj mitanam tu sapitakus a mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i, maar~…ĺa ku t…ôk…ôd a tuŇčus. **** a mińß ¶a mikawaw a ¶a tu mańßiniaj mitanam tu najaj ku t…ôr~…ĺaj a sapitakus, i r~…ĺun-tun ¶iniza patiz…ôŇč tu ma-k…ô-ni najaj t…ôr~…ĺaj satakus a kusi. **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad, ¶i ma-k…ô-ni migikiwaj a sakaput, i niw-b…ôn-r~…ĺan misur~…ĺup katukuńß makaj iŇč-kow patańßkar~…ĺ tu saajawaj mibar~…ĺat mir~…ĺakuit tu sa Ē~ °tip bajuaj najaj tir~…ĺaj diŇčwa a baŇču. **** a mińß ¶aan par~…ĺa tapaŇč…ôn, mar~…ĺa u kakitaan.**** a mińßa maazińß tar~…ĺakaw ku tat…ôbud nu Ňčiku. pasubana Ē~ °aj** masakapańß ńß…ônaj, ¶i ma-k…ô-ni ¶aaj kajadańß ku pi ¶udad tu kapańßaj a ¶a ¶udada, u ńßuw-sj…ô, su-sj…ô, u-r~…ĺi a tin…ôŇč makajzaaj amin i wama wina niza mitakus tu sajdan i r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° pasubana Ē~ °. i r~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° niza mir~…ĺijas tu pow-r~…ĺuŇč-nw a si…ônaw nu kasi…ônawan, tajza i dińßkuaj a tu-s-ka-na atu bow-r~…ĺow- r~…ĺun-s ńßawsa, u wama wina niza mitaakus a ¶a tu sajdan a pasubana Ē~ ° i r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. saajawaj pusubana Ē~ ° a sajdan ni ma-k…ô-ni sa ¶i b…ôn-saj- ¶o.r~…ĺo-sa "*in ¶…ônzo *osa" u r~…ĺi-ow-no a tus…ôaj nu tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan u-r~…ĺi-sj…ô a sajdan. b…ôn-saj- ¶o.r~…ĺo-sa "*in ¶…ônzo *osa" Ē~ ° psubana Ē~ ° ** ku mińß ¶aan ni ma-k…ô-ni, utin…ôŇč tu u-r~…ĺi-sj…ô, atu saajawaj bar~…ĺuńßaj a tj…ôn-sj…ô-r~…ĺi-r~…ĺun. ** a mińß ¶aan, ¶i ma-k…ô-ni panukas i pow-r~…ĺŇč-na, matin…ôŇč tu pow-r~…ĺŇč-na tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan u-r~…ĺi-sj…ô- ¶ja ¶i aow-ku-s-to.r~…ĺi- ¶i "augusto *igńßi", ujni u-r~…ĺi-sj…ô- ¶ja sakaj ¶i ńß…ô- ¶…ô-a r~…ĺi-r~…ĺun mut…ôs…ôk ku piŇčikiw. ¶i r~…ĺi- ¶i misur~…ĺur~…ĺ ¶i ma-k…ô-nian mi ¶umud tu pi ¶udadan a mi ¶udad ¶iniza, namańßini kapańß mi ¶umud tu pow-r~…ĺoŇč-na nu tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan pinanaman migiŇčkiw atu piazińßan tu ¶udad. satakus kawawan ńß…ônaj, ¶i ńß…ô- ¶…ô ¶-maazińß ku tj…ôn- ¶…ô-po mar~…ĺir~…ĺid manamuńß ¶i ma-k…ô-ni. zikuz mapasur~…ĺur~…ĺ ¶iniza ¶aajkat…ôn…ôs a mi ¶ar~…ĺuk tu niaow-ku-s-to.r~…ĺi- ¶i a giŇčkiw, pow-r~…ĺuŇč-na tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan ¶a ¶aj u-r~…ĺi-sj…ô pasubana Ē~ ° namapur~…ĺuŇč a ¶i ma-k…ô-ni migiŇčkiw. ***********, . **** a mińß ¶aan ** a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad sin-s-k…ô-s…ô-s…ônaj k…ô-r~…ĺaj-s-wanaj a ma-k…ô-ni- ¶an a pasur~…ĺu ¶an patańßkar~…ĺ tu satakus, ¶ja-na-ta par~…ĺa i kitakitan saka tusa makaj p…ô-mj…ô patańßkar~…ĺ tu janaj t…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ a satakus, mir~…ĺakiit tu war~…ĺibajua kanatar~…ĺ. **** a mińß ¶aan, ¶i ma-k…ô-ni patiz…ôŇč tu ¶a ¶aj misiwbajaj kawaw a sakaput, mi ¶akaj tu sa…ôdap patajza tu sand…ôb nisur~…ĺitan a sinbun, kujni nisur~…ĺitan a sapatakusa mi ¶unus sakatukus i bar~…ĺuŇča Ē~ ° kujni nisur~…ĺitan a sapatakus sa ¶unus katukuńß i bar~…ĺuŇčaan patańßkar~…ĺ tu r~…ĺabuaj nu tatip…ôr~…ĺuk. ma-k…ô-ni najaj t…ôr~…ĺaj a nisaŇča Ē~ °an tu tj…ô-ta-ni-ńßaw najaj t…ôr~…ĺaj a satakus i tj…ô-ta-ni-ńßaw "titani ¶" a sat…ôbu ¶an u kańß…ônur~…ĺan a kawaw. ju ujni bar~…ĺuŇčan iŇč-kow sakapańßaj a bar~…ĺuŇča i **** a mińß ¶aan satip baju mas…ôtur~…ĺ ku kur~…ĺi a buju Ē~ ° ńßawsa, misakakawawaj nu bar~…ĺuŇča ujza pakaj ma-k…ô-ni a najaj t…ôr~…ĺaj a diŇčaw patańßkar~…ĺ tu sar~…ĺuŇču ¶ pauzip a satakus pab…ôr~…ĺi i niw-j…ôaj nu mitur~…ĺ…ôsaj tu t…ôr~…ĺaj. kabar~…ĺakian a mińß ¶aan** nu uzip a nikauzip . ¶i ma-k…ô-ni tusa ku kakama ¶i a-baŇč-su, atu ¶a ¶aj pad…ôk nu wama a sabama , ¶i r~…ĺu-ji- ¶i. tatusa ku a ¶awa. i muw-so-r~…ĺi-ni situŇčus mikuwan tu i-ta-r~…ĺi a zidajan, ¶i ma-k…ô-ni nasakar~…ĺamkam sa mi ¶uk…ôr~…ĺ tu nizat…ôŇč ni ba-si-s atu mikawaw. pikiniŇčan** **** a mińß ¶aan a sapakiniŇč ¶i ma-k…ô-nian sakaj nipaajawan nu pańßusuaj a kawaw, a ¶a mikukaj ¶i ma-k…ô-nian tu najaj t…ôr~…ĺaj satakus a kusi i **** a mińß ¶aan mi…ôdap tu sja-kaŇč par~…ĺańßad tu sapuju Ē~ °aj p…ôr~…ĺat nu pańßusuaj, sja-kaŇč ¶…ôn-ńßu ¶iw-r~…ĺuŇč-taŇč a pańßusuan zuma ¶a ¶aj a zazan nu kaw-ja a zazan " ¶r~…ĺar…ô *oad" paŇčaŇčan ńßan ma-k…ô-ni zazan mar~…ĺa pikiniŇčan. zuma, zumaaj a nijazu Ē~ ° pow-r~…ĺuŇč-na kitakit a pańßikukian paŇčaŇčan ńßan ku-r~…ĺij…ô-ar~…ĺ-mow. ma-k…ô-ni kitakit a pańßikukian mar~…ĺa pikiniŇčan.
